'''Framjen Spathen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], while watching an "old" holovid that depicted a heavily muscled Spathen with long glowing hair, recalled that it was [[3 BBY/Legends|fifteen years old]], and that he had seen it in dozens of cheap clubs in the past. [[Bran Kemple]], watching the same holovid, expressed doubt as to whether Spathen's muscles were "real." Solo replied that he believed the muscles to be Spathen's, ''after'' Spathen had paid approximately two hundred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for them, plus installation fees.

{{Char-stub}}

*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
